user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable Vendor Management by selecting Yes or No, so that the module is available only when the organization needs it
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vendor Management Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the Vendor Management?"; Then my selection is captured for the configuration

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my Vendor Management configuration, so that the enable/disable choice is persisted and applied
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen Yes or No on the Setup screen; When I click Save; Then the configuration is saved and confirmed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel my changes on the Setup screen, so that I can discard an unsaved selection without affecting the current configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made a selection on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded and the previous configuration remains

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to be prompted to configure Vendor Management when it is not yet set up, so that I know the module requires configuration before use
acceptance_criteria: Given Vendor Management has not been configured; When I open the Setup screen; Then I see the "Please configure Vendor Management" guidance
